wins: Fourth quarter revenue grew 20% year-over-year and 9% sequentially to $608 million
Commercial business surpassed $1 billion in revenue over the last 12 months
Completed over 560 AIP bootcamps across 465 organizations
Signed multiple large deals with major companies including car rental, telecom, and pharmaceutical firms
Received a $330 million contract with the NHS to improve patient care
risks: U.S. government business results remained muted due to continuing resolution and timing of large potential contract awards
The Army's down selection for TITAN is expected in Q2 2024
The DoD is at the beginning of a long-term shift from hardware to software
Revenue from strategic commercial contracts is expected to decline in 2024
Global conflicts and geopolitical tensions may impact operations and revenue
